When you use Focus appss, it may be necessary to call your phone storage of pictures, documents, these contents are just for you to display and edit in Focus apps; or in your authorization, to use file management functions to store your edited pictures. Focus apps will not collect and upload the data, archiving, pictures and other information, or collect generated and uploaded information. It will not be used for other commercial services.3)
